name: BarChart
description: Bar chart component with stacked and percent variants
searchText: barchart bar chart component with stacked and percent variants @mantine/charts /charts/bar-chart barchartprops barlabelcolor barprops children cursorfill data datakey fillopacity getbarcolor gridaxis gridcolor gridprops legendprops maxbarwidth minbarsize orientation referencelines rightyaxislabel rightyaxisprops series strokedasharray textcolor tickline tooltipanimationduration tooltipprops type unit valueformatter valuelabelprops withbarvaluelabel withlegend withrightyaxis withtooltip withxaxis withyaxis xaxislabel xaxisprops yaxislabel yaxisprops

props.name: barChartProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts BarChart component

props.name: barLabelColor
props.description: Controls color of the bar label, by default the value is determined by the chart orientation

props.name: barProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Bar component

props.name: children
props.description: Additional components that are rendered inside recharts BarChart component

props.name: cursorFill
props.description: Fill of hovered bar section, by default value is based on color scheme

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to display chart.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Key of the data object for x-axis values

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: Controls fill opacity of all bars

props.name: getBarColor
props.description: A function to assign dynamic bar color based on its value

props.name: gridAxis
props.description: Specifies which lines should be displayed in the grid, 'x' by default

props.name: gridColor
props.description: Color of the grid and cursor lines, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: gridProps
props.description: Props passed down to the CartesianGrid component

props.name: legendProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Legend component

props.name: maxBarWidth
props.description: Maximum bar width in px

props.name: minBarSize
props.description: Sets minimum height of the bar in px

props.name: orientation
props.description: Chart orientation, 'horizontal' by default

props.name: referenceLines
props.description: Reference lines that should be displayed on the chart

props.name: rightYAxisLabel
props.description: A label to display next to the right y-axis

props.name: rightYAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the YAxis recharts component rendered on the right side

props.name: series
props.description: An array of objects with name and color keys. Determines which data should be consumed from the data array.

props.name: strokeDasharray
props.description: Dash array for the grid lines and cursor, '5 5' by default

props.name: textColor
props.description: Color of the text displayed inside the chart, 'dimmed' by default

props.name: tickLine
props.description: Specifies which axis should have tick line, 'y' by default

props.name: tooltipAnimationDuration
props.description: Tooltip position animation duration in ms, 0 by default

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Tooltip component

props.name: type
props.description: Controls how bars are positioned relative to each other

props.name: unit
props.description: Unit displayed next to each tick in y-axis

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format values on Y axis and inside the tooltip

props.name: valueLabelProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts LabelList component

props.name: withBarValueLabel
props.description: Determines whether a label with bar value should be displayed on top of each bar, incompatible with type="stacked" and type="percent"

props.name: withLegend
props.description: Determines whether chart legend should be displayed, false by default

props.name: withRightYAxis
props.description: Determines whether additional y-axis should be displayed on the right side of the chart, false by default

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether chart tooltip should be displayed, true by default

props.name: withXAxis
props.description: Determines whether x-axis should be displayed, true by default

props.name: withYAxis
props.description: Determines whether y-axis should be displayed, true by default

props.name: xAxisLabel
props.description: A label to display below the x-axis

props.name: xAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the XAxis recharts component

props.name: yAxisLabel
props.description: A label to display next to the y-axis

props.name: yAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the YAxis recharts component
